if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND c.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND c.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftCond :: selectById */ c.* , gif.gift_nm AS gift_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_gct.code_label AS cond_type_cd_nm FROM pm_gift_cond c LEFT JOIN pm_gift gif ON gif.gift_id = c.gift_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gct ON cd_gct.code_grp = 'GIFT_COND_TYPE' AND cd_gct.code_value = c.cond_type_cd WHERE c.gift_cond_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftCond :: selectList */ c.* , gif.gift_nm AS gift_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_gct.code_label AS cond_type_cd_nm FROM pm_gift_cond c LEFT JOIN pm_gift gif ON gif.gift_id = c.gift_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gct ON cd_gct.code_grp = 'GIFT_COND_TYPE' AND cd_gct.code_value = c.cond_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftCond :: selectPageList */ c.* , gif.gift_nm AS gift_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_gct.code_label AS cond_type_cd_nm FROM pm_gift_cond c LEFT JOIN pm_gift gif ON gif.gift_id = c.gift_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gct ON cd_gct.code_grp = 'GIFT_COND_TYPE' AND cd_gct.code_value = c.cond_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(c.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftCond :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_gift_cond c
